title: Blue16x
description: Blue 16x is a clean and smooth PvP texture pack featuring a stylish blue theme, optimized for better FPS and competitive gameplay performance.
body:
**Blue 16x – Clean PvP Texture Pack**

Blue 16x is a smooth, stylish, and performance-focused PvP texture pack designed for competitive Minecraft players. Built with a clean blue aesthetic, this pack enhances visibility, reduces visual clutter, and delivers a lightweight experience for maximum FPS.

Whether you're grinding ranked, playing BedWars, SkyWars, or intense duels — Blue 16x gives you the clarity and performance you need to dominate. ⚔️

✨ Features

🔹 Clean blue-themed UI and items
🔹 Short swords for better PvP visibility
🔹 Smooth and simplified textures
🔹 FPS boosting & low-end PC friendly
🔹 Clear particles and optimized effects
🔹 Perfect for competitive gameplay

**🎯Why Choose Blue 16x?**

Blue 16x is designed with PvP players in mind. The simplified 16x resolution keeps your game running smoothly while maintaining a modern and aesthetic look. The balanced color tones help reduce distractions, making it easier to focus during fights.
